_description: Expected audit-triple output on the synthetic test_data set. Used by run_all_tests.sh as the regression baseline. hallucination.total_slots and not-found count are stable; the on/off-topic split may drift with PubMed metadata.

hallucination._note: hallucinated count/rate depends on live PubMed state; test asserts total_slots + PMID-not-found only
